context: Tests whether the response implements a correct React error boundary with all required features.

checklist.name: Uses class component
checklist.description: Error boundary is a class component (error boundaries cannot be function components in React)

checklist.name: Implements getDerivedStateFromError or componentDidCatch
checklist.description: Implements static getDerivedStateFromError to update state and/or componentDidCatch for side effects

checklist.name: Renders fallback UI on error
checklist.description: The render method checks error state and shows a fallback UI instead of children when an error has occurred

checklist.name: Retry button resets state
checklist.description: Fallback UI includes a retry/reset button that clears the error state so children re-render

checklist.name: Logs error details
checklist.description: Error information is logged (console.error, external service, or callback prop)

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Code is syntactically valid React and correctly uses the error boundary API
